scripts.dev:reset-frontend-port: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:reset-frontend-port && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
